description_long: This is a plastic beverage bottle with a contoured, ergonomic shape and a red screw cap. The bottle's body is predominantly black with a wide, bright red label wrapped around its midsection, featuring the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo. The label is glossy and contrasts sharply with the matte black surface of the bottle. The cap is ribbed for grip and matches the red of the label, providing a cohesive color scheme. The bottle appears to be empty, as there is no visible liquid or transparency indicating contents. There are no visible signs of damage, scratches, or deformation on the exterior.
description: A contoured black plastic bottle with a red screw cap and a glossy red Coca-Cola label featuring white script.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full Coca-Cola logo in white script on the red label, with the red cap clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled view showing the left side of the label, with part of the Coca-Cola script visible and the bottle's contoured shape apparent.
description_view_2: Side view with the label mostly turned away, showing the plain red band and the bottle's black body.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the right side of the label, with the 'Coca' part of the script visible and the bottle's ergonomic curves.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola script logo on a glossy red label wrapped around the bottle's midsection.
